subcodes.first_line: O my God! This is a branch from the twigs of the Tree of Affirmation and a shoot from the branches of the Tree of Thy Divine Unity, who hath turned unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی هذا فرع من افنان شجره الاثبات و فنن من فروع دوحه وحدانیتک قد اقبل الیک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement
